framework.name: MCP as Commoditized Agent-Payment Bridge
framework.description: Visa chose MCP (an open-source Anthropic-originated protocol) rather than building a proprietary agent protocol. This means any MCP-compatible agent can connect — but it also means Visa's 'moat' is their API portfolio and network, not the agent integration layer itself. Strategically opposite to Mastercard building proprietary standards via consortium.
framework.raw_quote: MCP stands for Model Context Protocol — an emerging open-source framework that allows AI agents and large language models to communicate with external systems.

source.title: Visa advances agentic commerce with developer updates | Visa
